message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

actor User as user1 at 0
participant "UIBFF" as uibff1 at 25
rectangle DomainModel {
    control CommandBus as commandbus1 at 437.5
    entity Aggregate as aggregate1 at 689.5
    box ProcessManager processmanager1 at 941.5 endbox
    boundary EventBus as eventbus1 at 1193.5
}
control QueryManager as querymanager1 at 1445.5
entity Projectors as projectors1 at 1697.5
database ReadModels as readmodels1 at 1949.5

== Commands ==
user1 ->> uibff1 : http commands\ncommands\nevents\npush
uibff1 ->> commandbus1 : commands
commandbus1 ->> aggregate1 : commands
aggregate1 --> eventbus1 : events
eventbus1 <-- processmanager1 : events
processmanager1 <- commandbus1 : commands
projectors1 -->> readmodels1 : write
readmodels1 <--> querymanager1 : results
querymanager1 <-> uibff1 : queries/results
uibff1 <<-- user1 : push/http queries/queries/results

@enduml
